entity_reviews.name: Anthropic
entity_reviews.summary: ONGOING (Jun 12-13 2026): Anthropic Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models remain suspended per US Commerce Dept export-control directive received Jun 12. Models launched Jun 9, suspended Jun 12 for ALL users (foreign national filter not technically feasible in real time). Jailbreak concern relates to Mythos cybersecurity capabilities. Anthropic disputes scope of jailbreak. Status as of Jun 14: models still down. Governance/transparency signals: company published statement. Colorado AI Act delayed to Jan 1 2027 — reduces near-term compliance burden for all AI labs.
